package rulefixtures

// scenario for go_perf_layer_error_handling_cost_sentinel_error_allocated_per_call: Layer: Error handling cost. Flag identical sentinel errors allocated inside functions instead of package-level variables.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule533PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario533Positive(records []Rule533PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
